post.description: Submit code to be executed by Judge0 API.
Create a new lesson under a topic. Requires authentication.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to add lessons to this topic

get.description: Retrieve a lesson by its slug.

put.description: Update an existing lesson by its slug. Requires authentication and ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to update this lesson

delete.description: Delete a lesson by its slug. Requires authentication and ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to delete this lesson

get.description: Retrieve lesson content using lesson slug.

put.description: Update content of a lesson by lesson slug. Requires authentication and lesson ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to update content

post.description: Create lesson content by lesson slug. Requires authentication and lesson ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to add content

409.description: Content already exists for this lesson

delete.description: Delete content of a lesson by lesson slug. Requires authentication and lesson ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to delete content

get.description: Retrieve all quizzes of a lesson by lesson slug.

post.description: Create a new quiz for a lesson. Requires authentication and lesson ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to create quiz

post.description: Submit answers for a quiz and get the submission result. Requires authentication.

400.description: Invalid request format or invalid quiz ID

get.description: Retrieve quiz detail by quiz ID.

put.description: Update quiz detail by quiz ID. Requires authentication and quiz ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to update quiz

delete.description: Delete quiz by quiz ID. Requires authentication and quiz ownership.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to delete quiz

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of topics.

post.description: Create a new topic with title, description and author information. Requires authentication.

get.description: Retrieve a single topic by its slug.

put.description: Update an existing topic by slug. Requires authentication and ownership of the topic.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to update this topic

delete.description: Delete an existing topic by slug. Requires authentication and ownership of the topic. Topic cannot be deleted if it has existing lessons.

403.description: Forbidden - no permission to delete this topic

409.description: Cannot delete topic with existing lessons

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of lessons belonging to a topic identified by slug.
